destinations.snippet: logs are accepted when topic is DepositEvent::SIGNATURE_HASH or SUMMIT_DEPOSIT_SIGNATURE

atoms.notes: No Reth code change needed for deposit-topic behavior; dependency is source of truth.

summary: Remaining unresolved atoms are blocked for atomization or explicit scope decisions; concrete live behavior has been mapped or classified.
notes: A uniquely named destination file exists in the search scope, suggesting the behavior moved into a different repository path. Curated test-atom insertion appended 27 grouped behavior atom(s) from coverage-map/test-atom-audit; raw helper/no-assert/default-only cases were not canonicalized. Curated feature-preservation insertion appended 3 grouped feature-derived behavior atom(s). Long-running pass: active HTTP/ZK delivery paths mapped; unsupported broader two-phase delivery surfaces are fail-closed unless explicitly enabled.
